1. Aries - 8/10 - Natural leaders with strong impulses, Aries tend to be direct and bold in their approach.
2. Taurus - 7/10 - Practical and patient, Taurus signs are often reliable and consistent, but can also be stubborn at times.
3. Gemini - 9/10 - Quick-witted and adaptable, Geminis are often excellent communicators with a natural flair for expression.
4. Cancer - 8/10 - Emotional and empathetic, Cancers have a strong connection to their intuition and the feelings of others.
5. Leo - 7/10 - Confident and charismatic, Leos can be dramatic and attention-seeking, but also passionate and generous.
6. Virgo - 9/10 - Analytical and detail-oriented, Virgos are often perfectionists with a keen eye for precision.
7. Libra - 8/10 - Diplomatic and balanced, Librans strive for harmony and justice in their relationships and the world around them.
8. Scorpio - 9/10 - Passionate and intense, Scorpios are often private and mysterious, but also fiercely loyal and protective.
9. Sagittarius - 8/10 - Adventurous and optimistic, Sagittarians tend to be free-spirited and open-minded, with a love for exploration.
10. Capricorn - 7/10 - Disciplined and responsible, Capricorns are often ambitious and driven, but can also be serious and perfectionistic at times.
11. Aquarius - 9/10 - Humanitarian and independent, Aquarians tend to be rebellious and unconventional, with a strong desire for individuality.
12. Pisces - 8/10 - Imaginative and compassionate, Pisces are often dreamy and empathetic, with a deep connection to the spiritual realm.
Note: Keep in mind that this is just one possible interpretation of the signs, and scores can vary depending on the context and perspective!
